top_signals.title: Bank of England launches policy statement and draft rules on regulating systemic stablecoins

top_signals.title: Too Big To Break Again: India, Italy, and the Defense Partnership That Almost Wasn’t
top_signals.summary:
A single bribe nearly ruined a defense partnership most people didn’t know even existed. It took India and Italy almost a decade to recover.The story of how that rupture happened — and what it exposed about Italy’s quiet but deep role in India’s military — is essential to understanding why both countries now treat their renewed ties as something too valuable to lose again.When Indian authorities cancelled the AgustaWestland helicopter contract in 2014, the fallout went far beyond the headlines. Torpedo supplies to the Indian Navy’s Scorpène-class submarines froze, upgrades to over 20 Sea King helicopters stalled, and a naval

The post Too Big To Break Again: India, Italy, and the Defense Partnership That Almost Wasn’t appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitmine, SharpLink and Joe Lubin back Ethlabs nonprofit to advance Ethereum’s ‘next phase’ of growth
top_signals.summary: Ethlabs, backed by Joe Lubin and the two largest ETH DATs, Bitmine and SharpLink, will focus on institutional adoption.
